```{r}
    phenotype_flag_helpers = orchidee_resolve_script_path(
      "phenotype_flag_helpers.R",
      "script required for dedup cache fingerprint"
    )
  )
  script_hashes <- as.list(as.character(unname(tools::md5sum(script_paths))))
  names(script_hashes) <- names(script_paths)

  payload <- list(
    completion_fingerprint = as.character(completion_cache_meta$fingerprint),
    atb_cols = atb_cols,
    zit_values = zit_values,
    dedup_scope_defs = dedup_scope_defs,
    dataset_signatures = dataset_signatures,
    script_hashes = script_hashes
  )

  tmp_file <- tempfile(pattern = "dedup_fingerprint_", fileext = ".rds")
  on.exit(unlink(tmp_file), add = TRUE)
  saveRDS(payload, tmp_file, version = 2)
  fingerprint <- as.character(unname(tools::md5sum(tmp_file)))

  list(
    fingerprint = fingerprint,
    completion_fingerprint = as.character(completion_cache_meta$fingerprint),
    atb_cols = atb_cols,
    zit_values = zit_values,
    dedup_scope_defs = dedup_scope_defs,
    dataset_signatures = dataset_signatures,
    script_hashes = script_hashes,
    created_at = format(Sys.time(), tz = "UTC", usetz = TRUE)
  )
}

dedup_cache_meta_current <- build_dedup_cache_meta(
  completion_datasets_dedup = completion_datasets_dedup,
  dedup_scope_defs = dedup_scope_defs,
  atb_cols = atb_cols,
  zit_values = zit_values,
  completion_cache_meta = completion_cache_meta
)

expected_dedup_dataset_names <- names(completion_datasets_dedup)
expected_dedup_scope_names <- names(dedup_scope_defs)
```

```{r}
#| label: dedup_cache_control
recompute_dedup <- orchidee_config$cache$recompute_dedup
```

```{r}
#| label: dedup_cache_load
if (!isTRUE(recompute_dedup)) {
  for (candidate in dedup_cache_candidates) {
    cache_paths <- unlist(candidate, use.names = FALSE)
    if (!all(file.exists(cache_paths))) {
      next
    }

    loaded <- tryCatch(
      list(
        dedup_results = readRDS(candidate$results),
        dedup_cache_meta = readRDS(candidate$meta)
      ),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (is.null(loaded) || !is.list(loaded$dedup_results) || !is.list(loaded$dedup_cache_meta)) {
      next
    }
    if (!all(expected_dedup_dataset_names %in% names(loaded$dedup_results))) {
      next
    }

    structure_ok <- all(vapply(expected_dedup_dataset_names, function(dataset_name) {
      scope_list <- loaded$dedup_results[[dataset_name]]
      if (is.null(scope_list) || !is.list(scope_list) || !all(expected_dedup_scope_names %in% names(scope_list))) {
        return(FALSE)
      }
      all(vapply(expected_dedup_scope_names, function(scope_name) {
        res <- scope_list[[scope_name]]
        if (is.null(res) || !is.list(res) || !all(c("dedup", "class_map", "episode_summary", "audit") %in% names(res))) {
          return(FALSE)
        }
        if (!is.data.frame(res$dedup) || !is.data.frame(res$class_map) || !is.data.frame(res$episode_summary) || !is.data.frame(res$audit)) {
          return(FALSE)
        }
        scope_keys <- dedup_scope_defs[[scope_name]]
        dedup_ok <- all(c(scope_keys, "phenotype_class") %in% names(res$dedup))
        class_ok <- all(c(scope_keys, "phenotype_class") %in% names(res$class_map))
        episode_ok <- all(c(scope_keys, "n_docs", "n_classes", "has_multiple_classes") %in% names(res$episode_summary))
        audit_ok <- all(c(scope_keys, "order_sensitive", "n_within_class_discord_pairs") %in% names(res$audit))
        dedup_ok && class_ok && episode_ok && audit_ok
      }, logical(1)))
    }, logical(1)))
    if (!structure_ok) {
      next
    }

    required_meta_fields <- c(
      "fingerprint", "completion_fingerprint", "atb_cols", "zit_values",
      "dedup_scope_defs", "dataset_signatures", "script_hashes"
    )
    if (!all(required_meta_fields %in% names(loaded$dedup_cache_meta))) {
      next
    }

    if (!identical(as.character(loaded$dedup_cache_meta$fingerprint), dedup_cache_meta_current$fingerprint)) {
      next
    }
    if (!identical(as.character(loaded$dedup_cache_meta$completion_fingerprint), dedup_cache_meta_current$completion_fingerprint)) {
      next
    }
    if (!identical(loaded$dedup_cache_meta$atb_cols, atb_cols)) {
      next
    }
    if (!identical(loaded$dedup_cache_meta$zit_values, zit_values)) {
      next
    }
    if (!identical(loaded$dedup_cache_meta$dedup_scope_defs, dedup_scope_defs)) {
      next
    }

    current_sig <- dedup_cache_meta_current$dataset_signatures %>%
      transmute(dataset = as.character(dataset), n_rows = as.integer(n_rows), n_distinct_eltid = as.integer(n_distinct_eltid)) %>%
      arrange(dataset)
    loaded_sig <- loaded$dedup_cache_meta$dataset_signatures
    if (!is.data.frame(loaded_sig) || !all(c("dataset", "n_rows", "n_distinct_eltid") %in% names(loaded_sig))) {
      next
    }
    loaded_sig <- loaded_sig %>%
      transmute(dataset = as.character(dataset), n_rows = as.integer(n_rows), n_distinct_eltid = as.integer(n_distinct_eltid)) %>%
      arrange(dataset)
    if (!identical(loaded_sig, current_sig)) {
      next
    }

    current_script_hashes <- unlist(dedup_cache_meta_current$script_hashes, use.names = TRUE)
    loaded_script_hashes <- unlist(loaded$dedup_cache_meta$script_hashes, use.names = TRUE)
    if (!identical(loaded_script_hashes[names(current_script_hashes)], current_script_hashes)) {
      next
    }

    dedup_results <- loaded$dedup_results
    dedup_cache_meta <- loaded$dedup_cache_meta
    dedup_cache_source <- candidate$results
    break
  }
} else {
  dedup_cache_source <- "forced_recompute"
}
```

```{r}
#| label: dedup_execution
if (isTRUE(recompute_dedup)) {
  dedup_results <- NULL
  dedup_cache_meta <- NULL
  dedup_cache_source <- "forced_recompute"
  cat("dedup cache bypass: recompute_dedup=TRUE\n")
}

if (!isTRUE(recompute_dedup) && !is.null(dedup_results)) {
  message("Loaded dedup artifacts from ", dedup_cache_source)
  dedup_cache_decision <- "loaded"
} else {
  if (isTRUE(recompute_dedup)) {
    message("Force recompute requested; computing dedup outputs.")
  } else {
    message("No valid dedup cache found; computing dedup outputs.")
  }
  dedup_results <- purrr::imap(
    completion_datasets_dedup,
    function(ds, dataset_name) {
      representative_completeness_col <- if (identical(dataset_name, "sir_wide_raw")) {
        "nb_resultats"
      } else {
        "nb_resultats_post"
      }
      purrr::imap(
        dedup_scope_defs,
        function(scope_keys, scope_name) {
          stopifnot(all(scope_keys %in% names(ds)))
          spares_dedup(
            df = ds,
            atb_cols = atb_cols,
            group_keys = scope_keys,
            time_col = "HEUREPRELEV",
            date_col = "DATEPRELEV",
            document_id_col = "ELTID",
            completeness_col = representative_completeness_col,
            zit_values = zit_values,
            keep_class_members = TRUE,
            keep_audit = TRUE
          )
        }
      )
    }
  )
  dedup_cache_meta <- dedup_cache_meta_current
  saveRDS(dedup_results, file.path("data", "dedup_results"))
  saveRDS(dedup_cache_meta, file.path("data", "dedup_cache_meta"))
  dedup_cache_source <- "recomputed"
  dedup_cache_decision <- "recomputed"
  message("Saved dedup artifacts to: data/dedup_results, data/dedup_cache_meta")
}

stopifnot(!is.null(dedup_results))
cat("recompute_dedup: ", isTRUE(recompute_dedup), "\n", sep = "")
cat("dedup_cache_source: ", dedup_cache_source, "\n", sep = "")
cat("dedup_cache_decision: ", dedup_cache_decision, "\n", sep = "")

# One-row summary per (dataset, scope):
# - n_input_rows: input size before dedup.
# - n_retained_rows: representatives kept after dedup.
# - pct_episodes_multi_class: 100 * mean(has_multiple_classes).
# - order_sensitive_rate_pct: 100 * mean(order_sensitive).
# - n_within_class_discord_pairs must stay 0.
dedup_summary <- purrr::imap_dfr(
  dedup_results,
  function(scope_list, dataset_name) {
    purrr::imap_dfr(
      scope_list,
      function(res, scope_name) {
        episode <- res$episode_summary
        audit <- res$audit
        tibble(
          dataset = dataset_name,
          scope = scope_name,
          n_input_rows = nrow(completion_datasets_dedup[[dataset_name]]),
          n_retained_rows = nrow(res$dedup),
          n_episodes = nrow(episode),
          pct_episodes_multi_class = if (nrow(episode) > 0L) mean(episode$has_multiple_classes, na.rm = TRUE) * 100 else NA_real_,
          order_sensitive_rate_pct = if (!is.null(audit) && nrow(audit) > 0L) mean(audit$order_sensitive, na.rm = TRUE) * 100 else NA_real_,
          n_within_class_discord_pairs = if (!is.null(audit) && nrow(audit) > 0L) sum(audit$n_within_class_discord_pairs, na.rm = TRUE) else 0L
        )
      }
    )
  }
)

scope_sanity <- dedup_summary %>%
  select(dataset, scope, n_retained_rows) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = scope, values_from = n_retained_rows)

stopifnot(all(scope_sanity$global <= scope_sanity$by_type))
stopifnot(all(dedup_summary$n_within_class_discord_pairs == 0L))

show_audit_table(
  data = dedup_summary,
  file_stem = "dedup_summary",
  caption = "Dedup summary",
  page_length = 10,
  scroll_y = "320px",
  digits = datatable_digits
)
```

## Dedup Audits And Decisions

### Dedup impact vs raw

Question: after dedup execution, how much do dedup outcomes shift relative to raw baseline?

Evidence: `dedup_impact_summary` compares retained rows, key audit rates, and representative identity drift by scope.

```{r}
#| label: dedup_impact_audit

rep_key <- c(
  "PATID", "EVTID", "ELTID", "souche_id",
  "naturepvt_norm", "bact_norm", "DATEPRELEV", "HEUREPRELEV"
)

compute_rep_identity_drift <- function(res_raw, res_new, rep_key) {
  stopifnot(all(rep_key %in% names(res_raw$dedup)), all(rep_key %in% names(res_new$dedup)))
  a <- res_raw$dedup %>% distinct(across(all_of(rep_key)))
  b <- res_new$dedup %>% distinct(across(all_of(rep_key)))
  removed <- anti_join(a, b, by = rep_key)
  added <- anti_join(b, a, by = rep_key)
  tibble(
    n_rep_removed_vs_raw = nrow(removed),
    n_rep_added_vs_raw = nrow(added),
    n_rep_swaps_vs_raw = nrow(removed) + nrow(added)
  )
}

rep_identity_drift <- purrr::imap_dfr(
  dedup_results,
  function(scope_list, dataset_name) {
    purrr::imap_dfr(
      scope_list,
      function(res, scope_name) {
        raw_res <- dedup_results$sir_wide_raw[[scope_name]]
        drift <- compute_rep_identity_drift(raw_res, res, rep_key = rep_key)
        tibble(dataset = dataset_name, scope = scope_name) %>% bind_cols(drift)
      }
    )
  }
)

dedup_rep_drift_summary <- rep_identity_drift %>%
  left_join(
    dedup_summary %>% select(dataset, scope, n_retained_rows, n_within_class_discord_pairs),
    by = c("dataset", "scope")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    pct_rep_swaps_vs_raw = ifelse(
      n_retained_rows > 0L,
      100 * n_rep_swaps_vs_raw / n_retained_rows,
      NA_real_
    )
  )

raw_dedup_baseline <- dedup_summary %>%
  filter(dataset == "sir_wide_raw") %>%
  select(
    scope,
    raw_n_retained_rows = n_retained_rows,
    raw_pct_episodes_multi_class = pct_episodes_multi_class,
    raw_order_sensitive_rate_pct = order_sensitive_rate_pct
  )

dedup_impact_summary <- dedup_summary %>%
  left_join(raw_dedup_baseline, by = "scope") %>%
  transmute(
    dataset,
    scope,
    delta_retained_rows = n_retained_rows - raw_n_retained_rows,
    delta_pct_episodes_multi_class = pct_episodes_multi_class - raw_pct_episodes_multi_class,
    delta_order_sensitive_rate_pct = order_sensitive_rate_pct - raw_order_sensitive_rate_pct
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    dedup_rep_drift_summary %>%
      select(
        dataset, scope,
        n_within_class_discord_pairs,
        n_rep_removed_vs_raw,
        n_rep_added_vs_raw,
        n_rep_swaps_vs_raw,
        pct_rep_swaps_vs_raw
      ),
    by = c("dataset", "scope")
  )

stopifnot(all(dedup_impact_summary$n_rep_swaps_vs_raw == dedup_impact_summary$n_rep_removed_vs_raw + dedup_impact_summary$n_rep_added_vs_raw))
if (any(dedup_impact_summary$delta_retained_rows == 0L)) {
  stopifnot(all(
    dedup_impact_summary$n_rep_removed_vs_raw[dedup_impact_summary$delta_retained_rows == 0L] ==
      dedup_impact_summary$n_rep_added_vs_raw[dedup_impact_summary$delta_retained_rows == 0L]
  ))
}

show_audit_table(
  data = dedup_summary,
  file_stem = "dedup_summary",
  caption = "Dedup summary",
  page_length = 20,
  scroll_y = "360px",
  format_round_cols = c("pct_episodes_multi_class", "order_sensitive_rate_pct", "pct_rep_swaps_vs_raw"),
  digits = 3
)

show_audit_table(
  data = dedup_impact_summary,
  file_stem = "dedup_impact_summary",
  caption = "Dedup impact summary vs raw",
  page_length = 20,
  scroll_y = "360px",
  format_round_cols = c(
    "delta_pct_episodes_multi_class",
    "delta_order_sensitive_rate_pct",
    "pct_rep_swaps_vs_raw"
  ),
  digits = 3
)

invisible(list(
  dedup_summary = dedup_summary,
  dedup_impact_summary = dedup_impact_summary
))
```

Decision: dedup strategy sensitivity is material when retained-row deltas or representative identity drift in `dedup_impact_summary` are non-trivial versus `sir_wide_raw`.

### Class partition drift

Question: beyond retained-row deltas, do completion strategies change class partitions inside dedup episodes?

Evidence: `partition_drift_summary` quantifies episode-level class partition drift vs raw for each scope.

```{r}
#| label: dedup_partition_drift_audit
episode_partition_signature <- function(class_map, scope_keys) {
  stopifnot(all(c(scope_keys, "phenotype_class") %in% names(class_map)))

  row_key_pool <- c(
    "PATID", "EVTID", "ELTID", "souche_id",
    "DATEPRELEV", "HEUREPRELEV", "naturepvt_norm", "bact_norm"
  )
  row_key_cols <- intersect(row_key_pool, names(class_map))
  if (length(row_key_cols) == 0L) {
    stop("No usable row-key columns available to build partition signature.", call. = FALSE)
  }

  dup_group_cols <- unique(c(scope_keys, row_key_cols))

  class_map %>%
    mutate(across(all_of(row_key_cols), as.character)) %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(dup_group_cols))) %>%
    mutate(.dup_idx = row_number()) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    tidyr::unite("row_key", all_of(c(row_key_cols, ".dup_idx")), sep = "|", remove = FALSE, na.rm = FALSE) %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(c(scope_keys, "phenotype_class")))) %>%
    summarise(class_sig = paste(sort(row_key), collapse = "||"), .groups = "drop") %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(scope_keys))) %>%
    summarise(
      n_classes = n(),
      partition_sig = paste(sort(class_sig), collapse = "###"),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

compare_scope <- function(scope_name) {
  scope_keys <- dedup_scope_defs[[scope_name]]
  raw_sig <- episode_partition_signature(
    dedup_results$sir_wide_raw[[scope_name]]$class_map,
    scope_keys = scope_keys
  )

  purrr::imap_dfr(
    dedup_results,
    function(scope_list, dataset_name) {
      cur_sig <- episode_partition_signature(
        scope_list[[scope_name]]$class_map,
        scope_keys = scope_keys
      )

      raw_sig %>%
        full_join(cur_sig, by = scope_keys, suffix = c("_raw", "_cur")) %>%
        mutate(
          changed_n_classes = dplyr::coalesce(n_classes_raw, -1L) != dplyr::coalesce(n_classes_cur, -1L),
          changed_partition = dplyr::coalesce(partition_sig_raw, "__missing__") != dplyr::coalesce(partition_sig_cur, "__missing__")
        ) %>%
        summarise(
          dataset = dataset_name,
          scope = scope_name,
          n_episodes = n(),
          n_nclass_changed = sum(changed_n_classes),
          n_partition_changed = sum(changed_partition)
        )
    }
  )
}

partition_drift_summary <- bind_rows(
  compare_scope("by_type"),
  compare_scope("global")
) %>%
  arrange(scope, dataset)

stopifnot(all(
  partition_drift_summary %>%
    filter(dataset == "sir_wide_raw") %>%
    pull(n_partition_changed) == 0L
))
stopifnot(all(
  partition_drift_summary %>%
    filter(dataset == "sir_wide_raw") %>%
    pull(n_nclass_changed) == 0L
))

show_audit_table(
  data = partition_drift_summary,
  file_stem = "partition_drift_summary",
  caption = "Partition drift summary",
  page_length = 20,
  scroll_y = "340px"
)
```

```{r}
#| label: dedup_partition_drift_episodes
build_partition_drift_episodes <- function(scope_name, dataset_name) {
  scope_keys <- dedup_scope_defs[[scope_name]]
  raw_sig <- episode_partition_signature(
    dedup_results$sir_wide_raw[[scope_name]]$class_map,
    scope_keys = scope_keys
  )
  cur_sig <- episode_partition_signature(
    dedup_results[[dataset_name]][[scope_name]]$class_map,
    scope_keys = scope_keys
  )
 
  raw_sig %>%
    full_join(cur_sig, by = scope_keys, suffix = c("_raw", "_cur")) %>%
    mutate(
      changed_n_classes = dplyr::coalesce(n_classes_raw, -1L) != dplyr::coalesce(n_classes_cur, -1L),
      changed_partition = dplyr::coalesce(partition_sig_raw, "__missing__") != dplyr::coalesce(partition_sig_cur, "__missing__")
    ) %>%
    filter(changed_n_classes | changed_partition) %>%
    transmute(
      dataset = dataset_name,
      scope = scope_name,
      across(all_of(scope_keys)),
      n_classes_raw,
      n_classes_cur,
      changed_n_classes,
      changed_partition
    )
}

partition_drift_episodes <- purrr::map_dfr(
  setdiff(names(dedup_results), "sir_wide_raw"),
  function(dataset_name) {
    purrr::map_dfr(
      names(dedup_scope_defs),
      ~ build_partition_drift_episodes(scope_name = .x, dataset_name = dataset_name)
    )
  }
) %>%
  arrange(desc(changed_n_classes), dataset, scope)

show_audit_table(
  data = partition_drift_episodes,
  file_stem = "partition_drift_episodes",
  caption = "Partition drift episodes (changed partitions/classes)",
  page_length = 25,
  scroll_y = "500px"
)
```

### Swap decomposition

Question: are representative swaps mostly driven by partition changes or by representative re-ranking inside unchanged partitions?

Evidence: `swap_decomposition_summary` decomposes representative swaps (`removed + added`) by partition status.

```{r}
#| label: dedup_swap_decomposition_audit

swap_rep_key <- c(
  "PATID", "EVTID", "ELTID", "souche_id",
  "naturepvt_norm", "bact_norm", "DATEPRELEV", "HEUREPRELEV"
)

episode_partition_status <- function(scope_name, dataset_name) {
  scope_keys <- dedup_scope_defs[[scope_name]]
  raw_sig <- episode_partition_signature(
    dedup_results$sir_wide_raw[[scope_name]]$class_map,
    scope_keys = scope_keys
  )
  cur_sig <- episode_partition_signature(
    dedup_results[[dataset_name]][[scope_name]]$class_map,
    scope_keys = scope_keys
  )

  raw_sig %>%
    full_join(cur_sig, by = scope_keys, suffix = c("_raw", "_cur")) %>%
    mutate(
      changed_n_classes = dplyr::coalesce(n_classes_raw, -1L) != dplyr::coalesce(n_classes_cur, -1L),
      changed_partition = dplyr::coalesce(partition_sig_raw, "__missing__") != dplyr::coalesce(partition_sig_cur, "__missing__")
    ) %>%
    select(any_of(scope_keys), changed_n_classes, changed_partition)
}

rep_swap_events <- function(scope_name, dataset_name) {
  scope_keys <- dedup_scope_defs[[scope_name]]
  raw_res <- dedup_results$sir_wide_raw[[scope_name]]
  cur_res <- dedup_results[[dataset_name]][[scope_name]]

  key_cols <- intersect(
    swap_rep_key,
    intersect(names(raw_res$dedup), names(cur_res$dedup))
  )
  stopifnot(length(key_cols) > 0L)

  a <- raw_res$dedup %>%
    select(any_of(c(scope_keys, key_cols))) %>%
    distinct()
  b <- cur_res$dedup %>%
    select(any_of(c(scope_keys, key_cols))) %>%
    distinct()

  removed <- anti_join(a, b, by = key_cols) %>%
    mutate(swap_direction = "removed")
  added <- anti_join(b, a, by = key_cols) %>%
    mutate(swap_direction = "added")

  bind_rows(removed, added) %>%
    left_join(
      episode_partition_status(scope_name, dataset_name),
      by = scope_keys
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      dataset = dataset_name,
      scope = scope_name
    )
}

swap_decomposition_events <- purrr::map_dfr(
  setdiff(names(dedup_results), "sir_wide_raw"),
  function(dataset_name) {
    purrr::map_dfr(
      names(dedup_scope_defs),
      ~ rep_swap_events(scope_name = .x, dataset_name = dataset_name)
    )
  }
)

swap_decomposition_summary <- tidyr::expand_grid(
  dataset = names(dedup_results),
  scope = names(dedup_scope_defs)
) %>%
  left_join(
    swap_decomposition_events %>%
      group_by(dataset, scope) %>%
      summarise(
        n_rep_removed_vs_raw = sum(swap_direction == "removed"),
        n_rep_added_vs_raw = sum(swap_direction == "added"),
        n_rep_swaps_vs_raw = n(),
        n_rep_swaps_changed_partition = sum(changed_partition %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
        n_rep_swaps_same_partition = sum(changed_partition %in% FALSE, na.rm = TRUE),
        n_rep_swaps_nclass_changed = sum(changed_n_classes %in% TRUE, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      ),
    by = c("dataset", "scope")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      c(
        n_rep_removed_vs_raw,
        n_rep_added_vs_raw,
        n_rep_swaps_vs_raw,
        n_rep_swaps_changed_partition,
        n_rep_swaps_same_partition,
        n_rep_swaps_nclass_changed
      ),
      ~ tidyr::replace_na(.x, 0L)
    ),
    pct_rep_swaps_changed_partition = ifelse(
      n_rep_swaps_vs_raw > 0L,
      100 * n_rep_swaps_changed_partition / n_rep_swaps_vs_raw,
      NA_real_
    ),
    pct_rep_swaps_same_partition = ifelse(
      n_rep_swaps_vs_raw > 0L,
      100 * n_rep_swaps_same_partition / n_rep_swaps_vs_raw,
      NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(scope, dataset)

swap_decomposition_episodes <- swap_decomposition_events %>%
  group_by(
    dataset, scope,
    PATID, dedup_year, naturepvt_norm, bact_norm,
    changed_n_classes, changed_partition
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    n_swap_rows = n(),
    n_removed = sum(swap_direction == "removed"),
    n_added = sum(swap_direction == "added"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_swap_rows), desc(changed_partition), desc(changed_n_classes), dataset, scope)

stopifnot(all(swap_decomposition_summary$n_rep_swaps_vs_raw == swap_decomposition_summary$n_rep_removed_vs_raw + swap_decomposition_summary$n_rep_added_vs_raw))
stopifnot(all(swap_decomposition_summary$n_rep_swaps_vs_raw == swap_decomposition_summary$n_rep_swaps_changed_partition + swap_decomposition_summary$n_rep_swaps_same_partition))

swap_vs_dedup_summary_check <- dedup_impact_summary %>%
  select(dataset, scope, n_rep_swaps_vs_raw) %>%
  rename(n_rep_swaps_vs_raw_dedup = n_rep_swaps_vs_raw) %>%
  left_join(
    swap_decomposition_summary %>%
      select(dataset, scope, n_rep_swaps_vs_raw) %>%
      rename(n_rep_swaps_vs_raw_decomp = n_rep_swaps_vs_raw),
    by = c("dataset", "scope")
  )

stopifnot(all(swap_vs_dedup_summary_check$n_rep_swaps_vs_raw_dedup == swap_vs_dedup_summary_check$n_rep_swaps_vs_raw_decomp))

show_audit_table(
  data = swap_decomposition_summary,
  file_stem = "swap_decomposition_summary",
  caption = "Swap decomposition summary",
  page_length = 20,
  scroll_y = "360px",
  format_round_cols = c("pct_rep_swaps_changed_partition", "pct_rep_swaps_same_partition"),
  digits = 3
)
```

```{r}
#| label: dedup_swap_decomposition_episodes
show_audit_table(
  data = swap_decomposition_episodes,
  file_stem = "swap_decomposition_episodes",
  caption = "Swap decomposition episodes",
  page_length = 25,
  scroll_y = "500px"
)
```

Decision: completion strategy materially changes class structure when `partition_drift_summary$n_partition_changed > 0`, even if retained-row deltas are small.

Interpretation guide:

- if `n_rep_swaps_changed_partition` is dominant, completion is changing class boundaries in affected episodes.
- if `n_rep_swaps_same_partition` is dominant, completion mostly changes representative ranking inside stable partitions. **This seems to be the case.**
- if `delta_retained_rows` is near zero but `n_rep_swaps_vs_raw > 0`, dedup count stability hides representative identity drift.

### C3G indicator drift

Question: does completion strategy materially change C3G resistance indicators by `(year, naturepvt_norm, bact_norm)` after dedup?

Evidence: `c3g_indicator_impact_summary` compares dedup-level C3G counts/rates against raw baseline for each scope.

Column dictionary (source of truth):

- `c3g_indicator_panel` grain: one row per `(dataset, scope, dedup_year, naturepvt_norm, bact_norm)`.
- `dataset`: completion strategy (`sir_wide_raw`, `completion_date`, `completion_evtid`, `completion_patid_30d`, `completion_patid_year`).
- `scope`: dedup scope (`global` or `by_type`).
- `dedup_year`, `naturepvt_norm`, `bact_norm`: analysis keys.
- `n_isolates`: number of deduplicated isolates in the cell.
- `n_c3g_tested`: isolates with at least one informative C3G result (`S` or `R`) among `c3g_cols`.
- `n_c3g_resistant`: isolates with at least one resistant C3G result (`R`) among `c3g_cols`.
- `pct_c3g_resistant_all`: `100 * n_c3g_resistant / n_isolates`.
- `pct_c3g_resistant_tested`: `100 * n_c3g_resistant / n_c3g_tested`.

`c3g_indicator_impact` (cell-level drift vs raw baseline, same grain keys):

- Join logic: full join between raw and strategy panels by `(dedup_year, naturepvt_norm, bact_norm)` within each scope.
- Missing count columns after join are coerced to `0` (`*_raw`, `*_new` counts only).
- `dataset`, `scope`: strategy and scope of comparison.
- Raw/New count columns:
  - `n_isolates_raw`, `n_isolates_new`
  - `n_c3g_tested_raw`, `n_c3g_tested_new`
  - `n_c3g_resistant_raw`, `n_c3g_resistant_new`
- Raw/New rate columns (from panel):
  - `pct_c3g_resistant_all_raw`, `pct_c3g_resistant_all_new`
  - `pct_c3g_resistant_tested_raw`, `pct_c3g_resistant_tested_new`
- Delta count columns:
  - `delta_n_isolates = n_isolates_new - n_isolates_raw`
  - `delta_n_c3g_tested = n_c3g_tested_new - n_c3g_tested_raw`
  - `delta_n_c3g_resistant = n_c3g_resistant_new - n_c3g_resistant_raw`
- Delta rate columns:
  - `delta_pct_c3g_resistant_all = pct_c3g_resistant_all_new - pct_c3g_resistant_all_raw` only when both `n_isolates_raw > 0` and `n_isolates_new > 0`, else `NA`.
  - `delta_pct_c3g_resistant_tested = pct_c3g_resistant_tested_new - pct_c3g_resistant_tested_raw` only when both `n_c3g_tested_raw > 0` and `n_c3g_tested_new > 0`, else `NA`.

`c3g_indicator_impact_summary` (strategy/scope aggregate):

- `n_cells`: number of compared cells.
- `n_cells_pct_tested_comparable`, `n_cells_pct_tested_non_comparable`: count of cells with/without defined `delta_pct_c3g_resistant_tested`.
- `n_cells_pct_all_comparable`, `n_cells_pct_all_non_comparable`: count of cells with/without defined `delta_pct_c3g_resistant_all`.
- `n_cells_delta_n_resistant`: cells where `delta_n_c3g_resistant != 0`.
- `n_cells_delta_pct_tested`: cells where `abs(delta_pct_c3g_resistant_tested) > 0`.
- `max_abs_delta_n_resistant`: maximum absolute resistant-count drift across cells.
- `p95_abs_delta_pct_tested`: 95th percentile of `abs(delta_pct_c3g_resistant_tested)` on comparable cells.
- `total_delta_n_isolates`: net isolate-count drift across all cells.
- `total_delta_n_resistant`: net resistant-count drift across all cells.

Interpretation notes:

- Positive `delta_*` means strategy > raw baseline; negative means strategy < raw.
- `delta_pct_*` can be `NA` because denominator comparability is intentionally enforced (not an error).
- Invariant checks below enforce `total_delta_n_isolates == 0` and `total_delta_n_resistant == 0` for `dataset == \"sir_wide_raw\"`.

```{r}
#| label: dedup_c3g_indicator_impact

c3g_candidates <- c("ceftriaxone", "cefotaxime", "ceftazidime")
c3g_cols <- intersect(c3g_candidates, atb_cols)
if (length(c3g_cols) == 0L) {
  stop(
    "No C3G columns found in atb_cols. Expected at least one of: ceftriaxone, cefotaxime, ceftazidime.",
    call. = FALSE
  )
}

compute_c3g_panel <- function(ds, dataset_name, scope_name, c3g_cols) {
  stopifnot(is.data.frame(ds), "dedup_year" %in% names(ds))
  if (!"naturepvt_norm" %in% names(ds)) ds$naturepvt_norm <- NA_character_
  if (!"bact_norm" %in% names(ds)) ds$bact_norm <- NA_character_

  ds %>%
    mutate(
      n_c3g_tested_drugs = rowSums(across(all_of(c3g_cols), ~ .x %in% c("S", "R")), na.rm = TRUE),
      n_c3g_r_drugs = rowSums(across(all_of(c3g_cols), ~ .x == "R"), na.rm = TRUE),
      is_c3g_tested = n_c3g_tested_drugs > 0L,
      is_c3g_resistant = n_c3g_r_drugs > 0L
    ) %>%
    group_by(dedup_year, naturepvt_norm, bact_norm) %>%
    summarise(
      n_isolates = n(),
      n_c3g_tested = sum(is_c3g_tested, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_c3g_resistant = sum(is_c3g_resistant, na.rm = TRUE),
      pct_c3g_resistant_all = ifelse(n_isolates > 0L, 100 * n_c3g_resistant / n_isolates, NA_real_),
      pct_c3g_resistant_tested = ifelse(n_c3g_tested > 0L, 100 * n_c3g_resistant / n_c3g_tested, NA_real_),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(dataset = dataset_name, scope = scope_name, .before = 1)
}

c3g_indicator_panel <- purrr::imap_dfr(
  dedup_results,
  function(scope_list, dataset_name) {
    purrr::imap_dfr(
      scope_list,
      function(res, scope_name) {
        compute_c3g_panel(
          ds = res$dedup,
          dataset_name = dataset_name,
          scope_name = scope_name,
          c3g_cols = c3g_cols
        )
      }
    )
  }
)

impact_keys <- c("dedup_year", "naturepvt_norm", "bact_norm")

compute_c3g_impact_vs_raw <- function(dataset_name, scope_name) {
  raw_tbl <- c3g_indicator_panel %>%
    filter(dataset == "sir_wide_raw", scope == scope_name) %>%
    select(-dataset, -scope)
  new_tbl <- c3g_indicator_panel %>%
    filter(dataset == dataset_name, scope == scope_name) %>%
    select(-dataset, -scope)

  full_join(raw_tbl, new_tbl, by = impact_keys, suffix = c("_raw", "_new")) %>%
    mutate(
      dataset = dataset_name,
      scope = scope_name,
      n_isolates_raw = tidyr::replace_na(n_isolates_raw, 0L),
      n_c3g_tested_raw = tidyr::replace_na(n_c3g_tested_raw, 0L),
      n_c3g_resistant_raw = tidyr::replace_na(n_c3g_resistant_raw, 0L),
      n_isolates_new = tidyr::replace_na(n_isolates_new, 0L),
      n_c3g_tested_new = tidyr::replace_na(n_c3g_tested_new, 0L),
      n_c3g_resistant_new = tidyr::replace_na(n_c3g_resistant_new, 0L),
      delta_n_isolates = n_isolates_new - n_isolates_raw,
      delta_n_c3g_tested = n_c3g_tested_new - n_c3g_tested_raw,
      delta_n_c3g_resistant = n_c3g_resistant_new - n_c3g_resistant_raw,
      delta_pct_c3g_resistant_all = dplyr::if_else(
        n_isolates_raw > 0L & n_isolates_new > 0L,
        pct_c3g_resistant_all_new - pct_c3g_resistant_all_raw,
        NA_real_
      ),
      delta_pct_c3g_resistant_tested = dplyr::if_else(
        n_c3g_tested_raw > 0L & n_c3g_tested_new > 0L,
        pct_c3g_resistant_tested_new - pct_c3g_resistant_tested_raw,
        NA_real_
      )
    )
}

c3g_indicator_impact <- purrr::map_dfr(
  names(dedup_results),
  function(dataset_name) {
    purrr::map_dfr(
      names(dedup_scope_defs),
      ~ compute_c3g_impact_vs_raw(dataset_name = dataset_name, scope_name = .x)
    )
  }
) %>%
  relocate(dataset, scope, all_of(impact_keys))

c3g_indicator_impact_summary <- c3g_indicator_impact %>%
  group_by(dataset, scope) %>%
  summarise(
    n_cells = n(),
    n_cells_pct_tested_comparable = sum(!is.na(delta_pct_c3g_resistant_tested)),
    n_cells_pct_tested_non_comparable = sum(is.na(delta_pct_c3g_resistant_tested)),
    n_cells_pct_all_comparable = sum(!is.na(delta_pct_c3g_resistant_all)),
    n_cells_pct_all_non_comparable = sum(is.na(delta_pct_c3g_resistant_all)),
    n_cells_delta_n_resistant = sum(delta_n_c3g_resistant != 0L, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_cells_delta_pct_tested = sum(abs(delta_pct_c3g_resistant_tested) > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_abs_delta_n_resistant = max(abs(delta_n_c3g_resistant), na.rm = TRUE),
    p95_abs_delta_pct_tested = if (all(is.na(delta_pct_c3g_resistant_tested))) {
      NA_real_
    } else {
      suppressWarnings(as.numeric(quantile(abs(delta_pct_c3g_resistant_tested), 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)))
    },
    total_delta_n_isolates = sum(delta_n_isolates, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_delta_n_resistant = sum(delta_n_c3g_resistant, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(scope, dataset)

stopifnot(all(
  c3g_indicator_impact_summary %>%
    filter(dataset == "sir_wide_raw") %>%
    pull(total_delta_n_isolates) == 0L
))
stopifnot(all(
  c3g_indicator_impact_summary %>%
    filter(dataset == "sir_wide_raw") %>%
    pull(total_delta_n_resistant) == 0L
))

show_audit_table(
  data = c3g_indicator_impact_summary,
  file_stem = "c3g_indicator_impact_summary",
  caption = "C3G indicator impact summary",
  page_length = 20,
  scroll_y = "360px",
  digits = datatable_digits
)
```

```{r}
#| label: dedup_c3g_indicator_top_changes
c3g_indicator_top_changes <- c3g_indicator_impact %>%
  filter(dataset != "sir_wide_raw") %>%
  mutate(
    abs_delta_n_c3g_resistant = abs(delta_n_c3g_resistant),
    abs_delta_pct_c3g_resistant_tested = abs(delta_pct_c3g_resistant_tested)
  ) %>%
  group_by(dataset, scope) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = abs_delta_n_c3g_resistant, n = 20, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(abs_delta_n_c3g_resistant), desc(abs_delta_pct_c3g_resistant_tested), dataset, scope)

show_audit_table(
  data = c3g_indicator_top_changes,
  file_stem = "c3g_indicator_top_changes",
  caption = "C3G top changes (top 20 by dataset/scope)",
  page_length = 25,
  scroll_y = "500px",
  digits = datatable_digits
)
```

```{r}
#| label: dedup_c3g_indicator_decision_metrics

c3g_indicator_decision_metrics <- c3g_indicator_impact %>%
  filter(dataset != "sir_wide_raw") %>%
  summarise(
    max_abs_delta_n_resistant = max(abs(delta_n_c3g_resistant), na.rm = TRUE),
    n_cells_pct_tested_comparable = sum(!is.na(delta_pct_c3g_resistant_tested)),
    p95_abs_delta_pct_tested = if (all(is.na(delta_pct_c3g_resistant_tested))) {
      NA_real_
    } else {
      suppressWarnings(as.numeric(quantile(abs(delta_pct_c3g_resistant_tested), 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)))
    },
    n_positive_delta = sum(delta_n_c3g_resistant > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_negative_delta = sum(delta_n_c3g_resistant < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_zero_delta = sum(delta_n_c3g_resistant == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

show_audit_table(
  data = c3g_indicator_decision_metrics,
  file_stem = "c3g_indicator_decision_metrics",
  caption = "C3G decision metrics",
  page_length = 10,
  scroll_y = "260px",
  digits = datatable_digits
)
```

Decision: C3G drift is interpreted using magnitude (`max_abs_delta_n_resistant`) and spread (`p95_abs_delta_pct_tested`) on comparable denominator cells only, with directionality checked through positive/negative delta counts. In this run, `max_abs_delta_n_resistant = `r c3g_indicator_decision_metrics$max_abs_delta_n_resistant`, `p95_abs_delta_pct_tested = `r round(c3g_indicator_decision_metrics$p95_abs_delta_pct_tested, 3)`, `n_cells_pct_tested_comparable = `r c3g_indicator_decision_metrics$n_cells_pct_tested_comparable`, and directionality is mixed (`+`: `r c3g_indicator_decision_metrics$n_positive_delta`, `-`: `r c3g_indicator_decision_metrics$n_negative_delta`).

### C3G operational rates

```{r}
#| label: dedup_c3g_rates_all_datasets

compute_c3g_rate <- function(ds, group_vars, c3g_cols) {
  stopifnot(all(group_vars %in% names(ds)))
  stopifnot(length(c3g_cols) > 0L, all(c3g_cols %in% names(ds)))

  ds %>%
    mutate(
      n_c3g_tested_drugs = rowSums(across(all_of(c3g_cols), ~ .x %in% c("S", "R")), na.rm = TRUE),
      n_c3g_r_drugs = rowSums(across(all_of(c3g_cols), ~ .x == "R"), na.rm = TRUE),
      is_c3g_tested = n_c3g_tested_drugs > 0L,
      is_c3g_resistant = n_c3g_r_drugs > 0L
    ) %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(group_vars))) %>%
    summarise(
      n_tested = sum(is_c3g_tested, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_resistant = sum(is_c3g_resistant, na.rm = TRUE),
      taux_resistance_c3g = ifelse(n_tested > 0L, 100 * n_resistant / n_tested, NA_real_),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(across(all_of(group_vars)))
}

compute_c3g_rate_by_scope <- function(scope_name, group_vars, c3g_cols) {
  purrr::imap_dfr(
    dedup_results,
    function(scope_list, dataset_name) {
      compute_c3g_rate(
        ds = scope_list[[scope_name]]$dedup,
        group_vars = group_vars,
        c3g_cols = c3g_cols
      ) %>%
        mutate(dataset = dataset_name, scope = scope_name, .before = 1)
    }
  )
}

c3g_rate_global_dedup <- compute_c3g_rate_by_scope(
  scope_name = "global",
  group_vars = c("dedup_year", "bact_norm"),
  c3g_cols = c3g_cols
)

c3g_rate_by_type_dedup <- compute_c3g_rate_by_scope(
  scope_name = "by_type",
  group_vars = c("dedup_year", "naturepvt_norm", "bact_norm"),
  c3g_cols = c3g_cols
)

compute_c3g_rate_drift_vs_raw <- function(rate_tbl, join_keys) {
  raw_tbl <- rate_tbl %>%
    filter(dataset == "sir_wide_raw") %>%
    select(any_of(c("scope", join_keys, "n_tested", "n_resistant", "taux_resistance_c3g"))) %>%
    rename(
      n_tested_raw = n_tested,
      n_resistant_raw = n_resistant,
      taux_resistance_c3g_raw = taux_resistance_c3g
    )

  datasets <- setdiff(unique(rate_tbl$dataset), "sir_wide_raw")

  purrr::map_dfr(
    datasets,
    function(dataset_name) {
      new_tbl <- rate_tbl %>%
        filter(dataset == dataset_name) %>%
        select(any_of(c("scope", join_keys, "n_tested", "n_resistant", "taux_resistance_c3g"))) %>%
        rename(
          n_tested_new = n_tested,
          n_resistant_new = n_resistant,
          taux_resistance_c3g_new = taux_resistance_c3g
        )

      full_join(new_tbl, raw_tbl, by = c("scope", join_keys)) %>%
        mutate(
          dataset = dataset_name,
          n_tested_raw = tidyr::replace_na(n_tested_raw, 0L),
          n_resistant_raw = tidyr::replace_na(n_resistant_raw, 0L),
          n_tested_new = tidyr::replace_na(n_tested_new, 0L),
          n_resistant_new = tidyr::replace_na(n_resistant_new, 0L),
          delta_n_tested = n_tested_new - n_tested_raw,
          delta_n_resistant = n_resistant_new - n_resistant_raw,
          delta_taux_resistance_c3g = dplyr::if_else(
            n_tested_raw > 0L & n_tested_new > 0L,
            taux_resistance_c3g_new - taux_resistance_c3g_raw,
            NA_real_
          ),
          abs_delta_n_resistant = abs(delta_n_resistant),
          abs_delta_taux_resistance_c3g = abs(delta_taux_resistance_c3g)
        )
    }
  ) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs_delta_n_resistant), desc(abs_delta_taux_resistance_c3g), dataset)
}

c3g_rate_global_drift_vs_raw <- compute_c3g_rate_drift_vs_raw(
  rate_tbl = c3g_rate_global_dedup,
  join_keys = c("dedup_year", "bact_norm")
)

c3g_rate_by_type_drift_vs_raw <- compute_c3g_rate_drift_vs_raw(
  rate_tbl = c3g_rate_by_type_dedup,
  join_keys = c("dedup_year", "naturepvt_norm", "bact_norm")
)

# Compatibility shims: keep raw-only aliases for older downstream snippets.
c3g_rate_global_raw_dedup <- c3g_rate_global_dedup %>%
  filter(dataset == "sir_wide_raw") %>%
  select(-dataset, -scope)

c3g_rate_by_type_raw_dedup <- c3g_rate_by_type_dedup %>%
  filter(dataset == "sir_wide_raw") %>%
  select(-dataset, -scope)

c3g_rate_global_dedup <- c3g_rate_global_dedup %>% arrange(scope, dataset, desc(n_tested))
c3g_rate_by_type_dedup <- c3g_rate_by_type_dedup %>% arrange(scope, dataset, desc(n_tested))

show_audit_table(
  data = c3g_rate_global_dedup,
  file_stem = "c3g_rate_global_dedup",
  caption = "C3G rates global (all datasets)",
  page_length = 25,
  scroll_y = "500px",
  digits = datatable_digits
)

show_audit_table(
  data = c3g_rate_by_type_dedup,
  file_stem = "c3g_rate_by_type_dedup",
  caption = "C3G rates by type (all datasets)",
  page_length = 25,
  scroll_y = "500px",
  digits = datatable_digits
)

show_audit_table(
  data = c3g_rate_global_drift_vs_raw,
  file_stem = "c3g_rate_global_drift_vs_raw",
  caption = "C3G global drift vs raw",
  page_length = 25,
  scroll_y = "500px",
  digits = datatable_digits
)

show_audit_table(
  data = c3g_rate_by_type_drift_vs_raw,
  file_stem = "c3g_rate_by_type_drift_vs_raw",
  caption = "C3G by-type drift vs raw",
  page_length = 25,
  scroll_y = "500px",
  digits = datatable_digits
)

invisible(list(
  c3g_rate_global_dedup = c3g_rate_global_dedup,
  c3g_rate_by_type_dedup = c3g_rate_by_type_dedup,
  c3g_rate_global_drift_vs_raw = c3g_rate_global_drift_vs_raw,
  c3g_rate_by_type_drift_vs_raw = c3g_rate_by_type_drift_vs_raw
))
```

# Resistance indicators production

Product-facing RATB indicator production has moved to `orchidee_ratb_indicators.qmd`.

This split keeps the current notebook focused on:

- hospitalization scope construction
- completion strategies
- dedup behavior and diagnostics

and makes the rendered HTML materially lighter and faster to open.

Recommended render order:

1. `quarto render orchidee_dedup_workflow.qmd`
2. `quarto render orchidee_ratb_indicators.qmd`

## RATB QA appendix

This appendix centralizes the section-6 QA material that no longer belongs in
the product-facing indicators notebook.

### Indicator execution QA

```{r}
#| label: ratb_indicator_qa_build
#| echo: false
stopifnot(
  exists("load_ratb_indicator_spec", mode = "function"),
  exists("build_species_taxonomy_map", mode = "function"),
  exists("validate_ratb_indicator_spec", mode = "function"),
  exists("build_ratb_indicator_coverage_audit", mode = "function"),
  exists("build_ratb_indicator_panel_annual", mode = "function")
)

ratb_indicator_spec_path <- orchidee_config$paths$ratb_indicator_spec_path
ratb_indicator_datasets <- names(dedup_results)
species_taxonomy_path <- file.path(dictionaries_dir, "species_regex_map.csv")
bact_order_map <- build_species_taxonomy_map(species_taxonomy_path)

reference_dataset_name <- names(dedup_results)[[1]]
reference_global_dedup <- dedup_results[[reference_dataset_name]]$global$dedup
reference_by_type_dedup <- dedup_results[[reference_dataset_name]]$by_type$dedup

atb_cols <- intersect(sir_wide_meta$atb_cols, names(reference_global_dedup))
stopifnot(length(atb_cols) > 0L)

available_phenotype_cols <- intersect(
  c("blse_flag", "carbapenemase_flag"),
  names(reference_global_dedup)
)
available_sample_types <- sort(unique(na.omit(as.character(reference_by_type_dedup$naturepvt_norm))))

ratb_indicator_spec <- load_ratb_indicator_spec(ratb_indicator_spec_path)
ratb_indicator_spec_validation <- validate_ratb_indicator_spec(
  spec = ratb_indicator_spec,
  atb_cols = atb_cols,
  phenotype_cols = available_phenotype_cols,
  available_sample_types = available_sample_types
)

stopifnot(!any(ratb_indicator_spec_validation$duplicated_indicator_id))
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_spec_validation$supported_indicator_kind))
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_spec_validation$supported_sample_type_mode))
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_spec_validation$supported_numerator_kind))
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_spec_validation$supported_denominator_kind))
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_spec_validation$has_scope_mode))
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_spec_validation$has_filter_values))
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_spec_validation$has_valid_indicator_payload))

ratb_indicator_coverage_audit <- build_ratb_indicator_coverage_audit(
  spec = ratb_indicator_spec,
  validation = ratb_indicator_spec_validation
)

ratb_indicator_spec_wave1_exec <- ratb_indicator_spec %>%
  semi_join(
    ratb_indicator_coverage_audit %>%
      filter(executable_wave1) %>%
      select(indicator_id),
    by = "indicator_id"
  )

ratb_indicator_panel_annual <- build_ratb_indicator_panel_annual(
  dedup_results = dedup_results,
  spec = ratb_indicator_spec_wave1_exec,
  atb_cols = atb_cols,
  bact_order_map = bact_order_map
)

ratb_indicator_panel_global <- ratb_indicator_panel_annual %>%
  filter(scope == "global")
ratb_indicator_panel_by_type <- ratb_indicator_panel_annual %>%
  filter(scope == "by_type")

stopifnot(nrow(ratb_indicator_panel_annual) > 0L)
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_panel_annual$n_tested == ratb_indicator_panel_annual$n_r + ratb_indicator_panel_annual$n_s))
stopifnot(all(ratb_indicator_panel_annual$n_isolates == ratb_indicator_panel_annual$n_tested + ratb_indicator_panel_annual$n_o))
stopifnot(all(
  is.na(ratb_indicator_panel_annual$pct_resistant) |
    (ratb_indicator_panel_annual$pct_resistant >= 0 & ratb_indicator_panel_annual$pct_resistant <= 100)
))
```

```{r}
#| label: ratb_indicator_validation_table
show_audit_table(
  data = ratb_indicator_spec_validation %>%
    select(
      indicator_id,
      duplicated_indicator_id,
      supported_indicator_kind,
      supported_sample_type_mode,
      n_requested_molecules,
      n_available_molecules,
      all_required_molecules_available,
      phenotype_col_present,
      all_requested_sample_types_present,
      hard_validation_ok
    ),
  file_stem = "ratb_indicator_spec_validation",
  caption = "RATB indicator spec validation",
  page_length = 25,
  scroll_y = "420px"
)
```

```{r}
#| label: ratb_indicator_coverage_table
show_audit_table(
  data = ratb_indicator_coverage_audit %>%
    select(
      display_order, report_taxon_label, indicator_label,
      indicator_kind, publication_mode,
      proportion_execution_status, incidence_execution_status,
      coverage_note
    ),
  file_stem = "ratb_indicator_coverage_audit",
  caption = "RATB coverage audit",
  page_length = 25,
  scroll_y = "520px"
)
```

```{r}
#| label: ratb_indicator_overlap_regression
#| include: false
c3g_species_map <- tibble(
  report_taxon_label = c(
    "Escherichia coli",
    "Klebsiella pneumoniae",
    "Enterobacter cloacae complex"
  ),
  bact_norm = c(
    "escherichia_coli",
    "klebsiella_pneumoniae",
    "enterobacter_cloacae_complex"
  )
)

c3g_new_global <- ratb_indicator_panel_global %>%
  filter(indicator_label == "C3G") %>%
  inner_join(c3g_species_map, by = "report_taxon_label") %>%
  select(
    dataset, dedup_year, bact_norm,
    n_tested_new = n_tested,
    n_resistant_new = n_resistant,
    pct_resistant_new = pct_resistant
  )

c3g_old_global <- c3g_rate_global_dedup %>%
  filter(
    dataset %in% ratb_indicator_datasets,
    bact_norm %in% c3g_species_map$bact_norm
  ) %>%
  select(
    dataset, dedup_year, bact_norm,
    n_tested_old = n_tested,
    n_resistant_old = n_resistant,
    pct_resistant_old = taux_resistance_c3g
  )

c3g_global_consistency <- full_join(
  c3g_new_global,
  c3g_old_global,
  by = c("dataset", "dedup_year", "bact_norm")
) %>%
  mutate(
    delta_n_tested = n_tested_new - n_tested_old,
    delta_n_resistant = n_resistant_new - n_resistant_old,
    delta_pct_resistant = case_when(
      is.na(pct_resistant_new) & is.na(pct_resistant_old) ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ pct_resistant_new - pct_resistant_old
    )
  )

stopifnot(all(c3g_global_consistency$delta_n_tested == 0L))
stopifnot(all(c3g_global_consistency$delta_n_resistant == 0L))
stopifnot(all(abs(c3g_global_consistency$delta_pct_resistant) < 1e-8))

c3g_new_by_type <- ratb_indicator_panel_by_type %>%
  filter(indicator_label == "C3G") %>%
  inner_join(c3g_species_map, by = "report_taxon_label") %>%
  select(
    dataset, dedup_year, sample_type, bact_norm,
    n_tested_new = n_tested,
    n_resistant_new = n_resistant,
    pct_resistant_new = pct_resistant
  )

c3g_old_by_type <- c3g_rate_by_type_dedup %>%
  filter(
    dataset %in% ratb_indicator_datasets,
    bact_norm %in% c3g_species_map$bact_norm
  ) %>%
  select(
    dataset, dedup_year,
    sample_type = naturepvt_norm,
    bact_norm,
    n_tested_old = n_tested,
    n_resistant_old = n_resistant,
    pct_resistant_old = taux_resistance_c3g
  )

c3g_by_type_consistency <- full_join(
  c3g_new_by_type,
  c3g_old_by_type,
  by = c("dataset", "dedup_year", "sample_type", "bact_norm")
) %>%
  mutate(
    delta_n_tested = n_tested_new - n_tested_old,
    delta_n_resistant = n_resistant_new - n_resistant_old,
    delta_pct_resistant = case_when(
      is.na(pct_resistant_new) & is.na(pct_resistant_old) ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ pct_resistant_new - pct_resistant_old
    )
  )

stopifnot(all(c3g_by_type_consistency$delta_n_tested == 0L))
stopifnot(all(c3g_by_type_consistency$delta_n_resistant == 0L))
stopifnot(all(abs(c3g_by_type_consistency$delta_pct_resistant) < 1e-8))
```

### Denominator and perimeter QA

The denominator and perimeter work below now supports the published
incidence-density outputs. It remains in the backbone notebook because it is
still methodological QA and implementation documentation, not the primary
product view.

```{r}
#| label: ratb_perimeter_rules_table
show_audit_table(
  data = ratb_perimeter_rules,
  file_stem = "ratb_perimeter_rules",
  caption = "RATB TA/DE perimeter policy",
  page_length = 20,
  scroll_y = "280px"
)
```

```{r}
#| label: ratb_uf_ta_de_reference_table
show_audit_table(
  data = ratb_uf_ta_de_reference %>%
    select(
      SEJUF, consores_uf_label, CODE_TA, consores_ta_label,
      CODE_DE, de_domain_ref, consores_de_label, consores_care_type,
      uf_is_eligible_by_ta_de, uf_ta_de_status, uf_ta_de_reason
    ),
  file_stem = "ratb_uf_ta_de_reference",
  caption = "RATB UF TA/DE eligibility reference",
  page_length = 20,
  scroll_y = "360px"
)
```

```{r}
#| label: ratb_episode_exclusion_summary_table
show_audit_table(
  data = ratb_episode_exclusion_summary,
  file_stem = "ratb_episode_exclusion_summary",
  caption = "TA/DE incidence perimeter exclusion summary",
  page_length = 20,
  scroll_y = "320px",
  digits = datatable_digits
)
```

```{r}
#| label: hospital_days_year_summary_provisional_table
show_audit_table(
  data = hospital_days_year_summary_provisional,
  file_stem = "hospital_days_year_summary_provisional",
  caption = "Annual eligible hospital nights from PMSI TA/DE activity",
  page_length = 20,
  scroll_y = "260px",
  digits = datatable_digits
)
```

```{r}
#| label: ratb_numerator_scope_impact_audit_table
show_audit_table(
  data = ratb_numerator_scope_impact_audit,
  file_stem = "ratb_numerator_scope_impact_audit",
  caption = "Incidence numerator impact under the TA/DE perimeter",
  page_length = 20,
  scroll_y = "320px",
  digits = datatable_digits
)
```

```{r}
#| label: ratb_episode_scope_audit_table
show_audit_table(
  data = ratb_episode_scope_audit %>%
    filter(
      provisional_perimeter_status != "included" |
        zero_nights |
        cross_year
    ) %>%
    select(
      PATID, EVTID, provisional_perimeter_status, final_rule_level, final_reason,
      nights_provisional, zero_nights, cross_year, ratb_scope_status,
      eligible_uf_codes, noneligible_uf_codes, episode_ta_codes,
      episode_de_codes, episode_de_domains, episode_ta_de_reasons,
      episode_uf_codes, episode_uf_labels, episode_um_codes, episode_um_labels,
      episode_ghm_values
    ),
  file_stem = "ratb_episode_scope_audit",
  caption = "TA/DE incidence perimeter episode audit",
  page_length = 20,
  scroll_y = "360px",
  digits = datatable_digits
)
```

```{r}
#| label: hospital_stay_validation_summary_table
show_audit_table(
  data = hospital_stay_validation_summary,
  file_stem = "hospital_stay_validation_summary",
  caption = "Hospital stay validation summary",
  page_length = 20,
  scroll_y = "280px",
  digits = datatable_digits
)
```

```{r}
#| label: hospital_days_year_summary_table
show_audit_table(
  data = hospital_days_year_summary,
  file_stem = "hospital_days_year_summary",
  caption = "Hospital-days annual validation panel",
  page_length = 20,
  scroll_y = "320px",
  digits = datatable_digits
)
```

```{r}
#| label: hospital_stays_validation_audit_table
show_audit_table(
  data = hospital_stays_raw %>%
    filter(validation_status != "validated" | cross_year) %>%
    select(
      PATID, EVTID, validation_status, ratb_scope_status, datent_min, datsort_max,
      exact_elapsed_days, cross_year, evtid_multi_pat, pmsi_status_values,
      sejdur_values
    ),
  file_stem = "hospital_stays_validation_audit",
  caption = "Hospital stay audit (invalid or cross-year stays)",
  page_length = 20,
  scroll_y = "360px",
  digits = datatable_digits
)
```
